sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_format_row (number Int32, text_value String);
SELECT formatRow('CSV', number, text_value) FROM test_format_row;
UPDATE test_format_row SET text_value = 'excellent' WHERE number = 2;
SELECT formatRow('CustomSeparated', number, text_value) FROM test_format_row SETTINGS format_custom_result_before_delimiter='<prefix>', format_custom_result_after_delimiter='<suffix>';
